mapper.select:
SELECT g.id, g.user_id, g.title, g.tag, g.content, g.good_count, g.middle_count, g.bad_count, g.create_time, g.update_time, ou.username as nickname, ou.avatar FROM osh_info_gap g left join osh_user ou on g.user_id = ou.id WHERE g.status = 0 AND g.is_deleted = 0
ORDER BY g.good_count DESC, g.update_time DESC
ORDER BY g.update_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO osh_info_gap (user_id, title, tag, content, status, create_time) VALUES (#{userId}, #{title}, #{tag}, #{content}, #{status}, NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE osh_info_gap SET ${column} = ${column} + 1 WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
UPDATE osh_info_gap SET ${column} = GREATEST(${column} - 1, 0) WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
mapper.select: select * from osh_info_gap oig where oig.id IN ( select oigf.info_gap_id from osh_info_gap_follow oigf where oigf.user_id = #{currentUserId} and oigf.delete_flag = 0 ) order by oig.update_time desc
